EmailTemplate.name: Ascension-EmailTemplate-AMITA-ManagerNotification
EmailTemplate.Body:
#set($ctx = $spTools.class.forName("sailpoint.api.SailPointFactory").getMethod("getFactory", null).invoke(null,null).getCurrentContext()) #set($ruleObj = $ctx.getObjectByName($spTools.class.forName("sailpoint.object.Rule"), "Rule-Framework-Header-Footer-StyleSheet")) #set($ruleArgs = { "keyEmailTemplate" : "styleSheet" }) #set($styleSheet = $ctx.runRule($ruleObj, $ruleArgs)) #if( $ruleObj ) $ctx.decache($ruleObj) #end #set($ruleObj = $ctx.getObjectByName($spTools.class.forName("sailpoint.object.Rule"), "Rule-Framework-Header-Footer-StyleSheet")) #set($ruleArgs = { "keyEmailTemplate" : "headerTemplate" }) #set($headerTemplate = $ctx.runRule($ruleObj, $ruleArgs)) #if( $ruleObj ) $ctx.decache($ruleObj) #end #set($ruleObj = $ctx.getObjectByName($spTools.class.forName("sailpoint.object.Rule"), "Rule-Framework-Header-Footer-StyleSheet")) #set($ruleArgs = { "keyEmailTemplate" : "footerTemplate" }) #set($footerTemplate = $ctx.runRule($ruleObj, $ruleArgs)) #if( $ruleObj ) $ctx.decache($ruleObj) #end #set($ruleObj = $ctx.getObjectByName($spTools.class.forName("sailpoint.object.Rule"), "Rule-Server-Root-Path")) #set($ruleArgs = {}) #set($rootPath = $ctx.runRule($ruleObj, $ruleArgs)) #if($styleSheet) $styleSheet #end #if( $headerTemplate ) $headerTemplate #end

In preparation for the arrival of your new hire, please read this email and complete the necessary steps.

Below is the user name and temporary password for your new hire’s access to standard Google apps, local ministry network#if ($Map.get("Worker Type")) #if (!$Map.get("Worker Type").equals("non-hr contractor")), myAscension portal, Kronos timekeeping, MyLearning, and Peoplesoft modules for Travel/Expense and purchasing#end #end.

#foreach($mapElement in $Map.entrySet()) #if ($mapElement.getValue()) #if ($mapElement.getKey()) $mapElement.getKey(): $mapElement.getValue()
#end #end

#end

If they require additional application access (e.g. VPN, Clinical applications, etc) please submit the request by following this link

For your new hire’s hardware and equipment needs, please submit the request via ServiceNow->Service Catalog->IT Products. If you need assistance, please see KB34405 - How to place orders in Service-Now.

Upon arrival, you will need to provide your new hire their user name and temporary password for them to log into their Ascension device and Google Workspace (GSuite) Account. If they are attending an orientation session on their first day, please ensure they have this information on hand. #if ($Map.get("Worker Type")) #if (!$Map.get("Worker Type").equals("non-hr contractor"))They will also be required to enroll separately in multi-factor authentication prior to gaining access to the myAscension portal. For more information about multi-factor authentication, please see https://mfa.ascension.org/faq.#end #end

*A password does not get set if a password already exists. If the associate is not aware of the current password please have them contact the Ascension Technologies Service Desk for a password reset.

Thank you,
The IAM Operations Team

#if($internalId)

For Internal Use Only

Ref: SailPoint ID: $internalId

#end #if( $footerTemplate ) $footerTemplate #end
EmailTemplate.Description: Email Template for notifying managers when an employee's account(s) are modified. Note that in addition to the declared arguments, all workflow variables, Step arguments, and Approval arguments defined in the Workflow are also available.

Argument.name: identityDisplayName
Argument.Description: The display name of the Identity that is being changed.

Argument.name: operation
Argument.Description: The display name of the Identity that is being changed.

EmailTemplate.Subject: Request for AD Account $!operation for $!identityDisplayName was processed
